criteria.criterion: DBB-001: OPFSBackend.stat() returns {size, mtime} for existing file
DBB-002: OPFSBackend.stat() returns null for missing file
DBB-003: OPFSBackend.stat() size matches byte length of written content
DBB-004: AgenticStoreBackend.stat() returns {size, mtime} for existing key
DBB-005: AgenticStoreBackend.stat() returns null for missing key
DBB-006: stat() interface parity — identical shape across OPFSBackend and AgenticStoreBackend
DBB-007: file_delete agent tool — existing file deleted successfully
DBB-008: file_delete agent tool — missing file returns error, no unhandled exception
DBB-009: file_tree agent tool — non-empty directory returns all files
DBB-010: file_tree agent tool — empty directory returns empty result
DBB-011: file_delete and file_tree appear in getToolDefinitions()
DBB-012: createDefaultBackend() returns NodeFsBackend in Node.js
DBB-013: createDefaultBackend() returns OPFSBackend in browser with OPFS
DBB-014: createDefaultBackend() falls back to MemoryStorage
